description: Implement vector embeddings with true hybrid search (BM25 + cosine similarity), and LLM-powered automatic memory consolidation that summarizes working memory, extracts facts, and identifies patterns.
steps: Create src/lib/langchain/embeddings-service.ts - Service that: (1) generates embedding for a text and stores in VectorEmbedding table, (2) batch generates embeddings for multiple entries, (3) searches VectorEmbedding by cosine similarity against a query embedding, (4) has a function to sync all existing KnowledgeEntry and AgentMemory records that don't have embeddings yet.

Create src/app/api/agent/embeddings/route.ts - POST endpoint to trigger embedding generation for all knowledge entries and memories that lack embeddings. GET endpoint to check embedding coverage stats (total entries, entries with embeddings, entries without).

Update src/app/api/agent/search/route.ts - Upgrade the existing hybrid search to combine BM25 scoring (already implemented) with vector cosine similarity. New flow: (1) generate embedding for query, (2) find top-N similar vectors from VectorEmbedding table, (3) merge BM25 results with vector results using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), (4) return combined ranked results. Keep backward compatibility - if no embeddings exist, fall back to BM25-only.
Update src/app/api/knowledge/route.ts POST handler - After creating a knowledge entry, trigger embedding generation asynchronously (fire-and-forget, don't block the response).

Create src/lib/langchain/consolidation.ts - LLM-powered memory consolidation service: (1) summarizeWorkingMemories(memories: AgentMemory[]): uses LLM to generate a concise episodic summary from working memory contents, (2) extractSemanticFacts(episodicMemory: AgentMemory): uses LLM to extract key facts/entities, (3) identifyProceduralPatterns(semanticMemories: AgentMemory[]): uses LLM to identify recurring successful response patterns.

Update src/app/api/agent/memory/consolidate/route.ts - Replace the simple string concatenation logic with LLM-powered consolidation. Working->Episodic: use summarizeWorkingMemories to create meaningful summaries. Episodic->Semantic: use extractSemanticFacts to pull out discrete facts. Semantic->Procedural: use identifyProceduralPatterns for memories accessed 3+ times. Keep the existing time-based triggers (1 hour for working, 24 hours for episodic). Generate embeddings for newly created memories.
acceptance_criteria: VectorEmbedding records can be created and queried by cosine similarity
Hybrid search at /api/agent/search combines BM25 + vector similarity with RRF
Memory consolidation uses LLM to generate summaries and extract facts
New knowledge entries trigger async embedding generation
npm run build completes without errors
findings: All implementations done: embeddings-service.ts with storeEmbedding/batchStoreEmbeddings/searchByVector/getEmbeddingCoverage, embeddings route (GET/POST), hybrid search with RRF (k=60) in search route with graceful fallback to BM25-only, async embedding on knowledge creation, LLM-powered consolidation with summarizeWorkingMemories/extractSemanticFacts/identifyProceduralPatterns (all with fallback to original simple logic). Build and lint pass cleanly.
